titleZh: 外国企业或者个人在中国境内设立合伙企业管理办法
titleEn: Measures for the Administration of the Establishment of Partnership Enterprises in China by Foreign Enterprises or Individuals
shortTitle: 外国企业或者个人在中国境内设立合伙企业管理办法
aliases: 外商投资合伙企业设立管理办法
summaryZh: 国务院令第567号允许外国企业或者个人以合伙形式在中国境内投资，并将外商投资政策、送达机制与合伙登记制度衔接起来。
summaryEn: State Council Order No. 567 opened the partnership form to foreign enterprises and individuals and linked foreign-investment policy with partnership registration requirements.

sources.label: Public English translation (reference)
sources.noteZh: EU SME Centre公开英文译本，可作检索与比对；法律效力仍以国务院官方中文文本为准。
sources.noteEn: Public English translation hosted by the EU SME Centre for reference; the official State Council Chinese text remains controlling.
